root.m_Talk_ENG: You know as well as I do.
root.m_Talk_DEU: You know as well as I do.
root.m_Talk_FRA: You know as well as I do.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Anyone Earthbound never meets a happy end.

root.m_Talk_FRA: Anyone Earthbound never meets a happy end.

root.m_Talk_ENG: But that same curse gives us the strength to fight the Beasts.
root.m_Talk_DEU: But that same curse gives us the strength to fight the Beasts.
root.m_Talk_FRA: But that same curse gives us the strength to fight the Beasts.

root.m_Talk_ENG: So, this is my fate to carry.
root.m_Talk_DEU: So, this is my fate to carry.
root.m_Talk_FRA: So, this is my fate to carry.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I am Earthbound too! So why do you insist on doing this alone?!

root.m_Talk_FRA: I am Earthbound too! So why do you insist on doing this alone?!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Because I don't need your help!

root.m_Talk_FRA: Because I don't need your help!

root.m_Talk_ENG:

8vIf you truly mean that, then I want to hear your reason.


8vIf you truly mean that, then I want to hear your reason.


8vIf you truly mean that, then I want to hear your reason.

root.m_Talk_ENG: You know nothing, Seosaeng.

root.m_Talk_FRA: You know nothing, Seosaeng.

root.m_Talk_ENG: And it's better that way.

8v but for all of ours.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I'm also a member of Trivanguard hunting the Tiger, am I not?!

root.m_Talk_FRA: I'm far stronger than you. You'd only hold me back.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Then let's settle this with our blades.

root.m_Talk_FRA: Then let's settle this with our blades.

If I prove I'm strong enough to beat you
